tools.Name: LiteLLM
tools.Description: A Python SDK and Proxy Server that provides a unified interface to call over 100+ LLM APIs using the OpenAI format.
tools.Use_Case: Unified API management, cost tracking, load balancing, and guardrails for multi-LLM applications.

tools.Name: Strix
tools.Description: Autonomous AI agents designed for dynamic security testing, vulnerability discovery, and automated proof-of-concept generation.
tools.Use_Case: Application security testing, rapid penetration testing, and automated bug bounty research within CI/CD pipelines.

tools.Name: DeerFlow
tools.Description: An open-source 'super agent' harness that orchestrates sub-agents, memory, and sandboxed execution environments for complex tasks.
tools.Use_Case: Automating long-running research, coding projects, and complex data-driven workflows using multi-agent orchestration.
